reason: Fake war campaign satirizes political spin and media manipulation with razor-sharp wit.
Campaign insider drama skewers political ambition and backroom dealmaking.
Mockumentary on an extremist candidate lampoons political theatrics and media hype.
Charmingly absurd White House romance with quick-witted political banter.
Drunken addict becomes pawn in pro- and anti-choice PR war, exposing activist absurdity.
Thrilling White House heist that also skewers public relations and political cover-ups.
Courtroom battle over free speech lampoons media circus and political grandstanding.
Hollywood satire reveals absurd backroom spin in movie business, fast and biting.
Broadway-meets-mob comedy skewers theatrical backstabbing and publicity stunts.
Conspiracy thriller turned dark comedy lampoons paranoia and media sensationalism.
